google-analytics.label: Google Analytics

_gac_.description: Contains information related to marketing campaigns of the user. These are shared with Google AdWords / Google Ads when the Google Ads and Google Analytics accounts are linked together.

__utma.description: ID used to identify users and sessions

__utmt.description: Used to monitor number of Google Analytics server requests

__utmb.description: Used to distinguish new sessions and visits. This cookie is set when the GA.js javascript library is loaded and there is no existing __utmb cookie. The cookie is updated every time data is sent to the Google Analytics server.

__utmc.description: Used only with old Urchin versions of Google Analytics and not with GA.js. Was used to distinguish between new sessions and visits at the end of a session.

__utmz.description: Contains information about the traffic source or campaign that directed user to the website. The cookie is set when the GA.js javascript is loaded and updated when data is sent to the Google Anaytics server

__utmv.description: Contains custom information set by the web developer via the _setCustomVar method in Google Analytics. This cookie is updated every time new data is sent to the Google Analytics server.

__utmx.description: Used to determine whether a user is included in an A / B or Multivariate test.

_gali.description: Used by Google Analytics to determine which links on a page are being clicked

_gid.description: ID used to identify users for 24 hours after last activity

_gat.description: Used to monitor number of Google Analytics server requests when using Google Tag Manager

google-analytics.description: Google Analytics is a powerful tool that tracks and analyzes website traffic for informed marketing decisions.

facebook-pixel.label: Facebook Pixel

_fbc.description: Used to track the last session visit.

_fbp.description: Used to track the user across multiple sessions.

fr.description: Used to track the user across multiple sessions.

facebook-pixel.description: Facebook Pixel is a web analytics service that tracks and reports website traffic.

linkedin-insight.label: LinkedIn Insight

lidc.description: Used for routing and session management.

liap.description: Used for authentication of LinkedIn members.

li_oatml.description: Used for identifying LinkedIn Members for advertising and analytics.

li_sugr.description: Used to make a probabilistic match of a user's identity.

li_fat_id.description: Used for member indirect identifier for conversion tracking.

linkedin-insight.description: LinkedIn Insight is a web analytics service that tracks and reports website traffic.

comments.label: Comments

comment_author.description: Used to track the user across multiple sessions.

comment_author_email.description: Used to track the user across multiple sessions.

comment_author_url.description: Used to track the user across multiple sessions.

comments.description: These cookies are needed for adding comments on this website.

easy_digital_downloads.label: Easy Digital Downloads

edd_session_.description: Stores information about the current user session.

edd_items_in_cart.description: Stores information about the cart contents.

easy_digital_downloads.description: Easy Digital Downloads is a WordPress plugin for selling digital products effortlessly and managing transactions.

woocommerce.label: WooCommerce

wp_woocommerce_session_.description: Contains a unique code for each customer so that it knows where to find the cart data in the database for each customer.

woocommerce_recently_viewed.description: Powers the Recent Viewed Products widget

store_notice.description: Allows customers to dismiss the Store Notice.

woocommerce_snooze_suggestions__.description: Allows dashboard users to dismiss Marketplace suggestions, if enabled.

woocommerce_dismissed_suggestions__.description: Count of suggestion dismissals, if enabled.

woocommerce_cart_hash.description: Helps WooCommerce determine when cart contents/data changes.

woocommerce_items_in_cart.description: Helps WooCommerce determine when cart contents/data changes.

woocommerce.description: WooCommerce is a customizable eCommerce platform for building online stores using WordPress.

wp-consent-api.label: WP Consent API

wp_consent_{category}.description: Stores your consent preference for a specific cookie category (e.g., functional, marketing). It ensures consistent consent management across WordPress plugins supporting the WP Consent API.

wp-consent-api.description: WP Consent API is a plugin that standardizes the communication of accepted consent categories between plugins.
